scope: single-seed zero-training qualification of fixed FP32 geometry messages with linear-time target-contiguous deterministic reductions inside otherwise BF16 tensor-free execution; no checkpoint, H1b-H6 or tensor conditioning

model.reduction_contract: target-contiguous torch.segment_reduce without runtime sorting or CUDA atomic addition

audit.only_change_from_v1_v2: remove redundant per-reduction sorting while retaining non-atomic segment reduction

decision_rule.pass: retain linear deterministic reductions, the fixed geometry precision boundary and Cartesian tangent metric, then freeze exactly one same-seed one-pass coordinate-only pretraining protocol
decision_rule.fail: remove all candidates, restore the last qualified production coordinate path, and return to probability-path analysis without fitting targets
decision_rule.boundary: This zero-training qualification cannot qualify H1a, add steps or seeds, initialize joint training, or authorize H1b-H6, tensor conditioning, oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
